name: checkbox
title: Checkbox
description: Three-state checkbox (checked, unchecked, indeterminate) with keyboard support and custom icon slots.

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Checkbox. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.

disabled.description: Standard disabled state; Angular forms set this automatically.
